# [Clang] Assertion `isa<LabelDecl>(D) && "declaration not instantiated in this scope"` failed since 10.0

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/175424

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 10.0 with `-std=c++20` flag.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/6rK99sKef

## Program
```cpp
template <class T> int bar(T) {
  int d = 0;
  if constexpr (requires { requires(sizeof(int) > d); })
}
```
